ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country it belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Reference to the region it belongs to */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the sub-region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity data record */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-region */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date */,
  "retail_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in retail activity from baseline */,
  "grocery_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in grocery and pharmacy activity from baseline */,
  "parks_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in parks activity from baseline */,
  "transit_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in transit station activity from baseline */,
  "workplace_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in workplace activity from baseline */,
  "residential_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in residential activity from baseline */,
  "social_distance_avg" REAL /* Average social distancing measure */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the activity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date_value" TEXT /* The date itself */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-365) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_distancing" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social distancing measure record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related activity data */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance maintained socially (in meters) */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance maintained socially (in meters) */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance maintained socially (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_distancing_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_data ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that accessed the data */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity data accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activity_data ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
